values.name: field
values.type: Decoder a -> Decoder (a -> b) -> Decoder b

values.name: optional
values.type: String -> Decoder a -> Decoder (Maybe a -> b) -> Decoder b

values.name: optionalEncoder
values.type: String -> (a -> Value) -> Maybe a -> Maybe ( String, Value )

values.name: repeated
values.type: String -> Decoder a -> Decoder (List a -> b) -> Decoder b

values.name: repeatedFieldEncoder
values.type: String -> (a -> Value) -> List a -> Maybe ( String, Value )

values.name: required
values.type: String -> Decoder a -> a -> Decoder (a -> b) -> Decoder b

values.name: requiredFieldEncoder
values.type: String -> (a -> Value) -> a -> a -> Maybe ( String, Value )

values.name: withDefault
values.comment: Provides a default value for a field.
